reason: This is a high-quality sample with a natural, curious user who progressively explores a codebase without using technical jargon. The assistant appropriately uses tree, grep, and glob tools to explore the project structure, find dependencies, examine source files, and discover API endpoints. All assistant summaries are directly grounded in visible tool outputs - the tree shows the directory structure, grep searches reveal express/body-parser/dotenv dependencies and function definitions, glob finds route files, and subsequent grep calls identify all REST endpoints. The trajectory successfully completes all blueprint goals in a logical order: verifying tools, exploring structure, finding source files, and searching for specific content. The tool name prefixes (skill-tools-*) are harmless runtime wrappers that don't affect the sample quality. No contradictions, no fabricated facts, and no runtime errors that damage trust in the trajectory.
